_publications._publicationTitle: Cell of origin and microenvironment contribution for NF1-associated dermal neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Paraffin sections were assessed with S100β and GAP43 immunohistochemistry (Schwann cell markers), and Leder (mast cell) and H&E staining
details: Successfully used for immunohistochemistry to identify Schwann cell markers in tumor analysis
